author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — owner-level architectural refactor (1607-line file split across 4 new modules; touches the ACP protocol surface).

**Fix outline:** Split src/acp.rs into:
- src/acp/transport.rs — AcpTransport { stdout, stdin, pending_responses } owns JSON-RPC framing (send_response, send_notification, send_error, client_request)
- src/acp/protocol.rs — dispatcher + typed handle_X request structs (serde-derived) replacing the raw params: Value pattern, covering handle_initialize/authenticate/session_new/load/cancel/set_mode/set_config_option/prompt
- src/acp/tools.rs — each acp_* tool (acp_read_file/write_file/edit_file/bash/bash_output/kill_shell/list_files/search) as a free function taking &mut Workspace
- src/acp/mod.rs — AcpSession orchestrator only
The agentic loop (run_prompt_loop, lines 555-775) should delegate to the extracted run_agentic_loop from #449 rather than be a local copy.

**Recommendation:** Owner-level call on module layout and on whether to land it before or after #449. Defer.
